title: French Flair Flaxen Crepes
description: Thin French crepes filled with a delicious and healthy flaxseed mixture. Perfect for a light and satisfying breakfast or snack.
instructions: Combine flaxseed meal, flour, and water in a bowl.
Mix well and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of coconut oil and swirl it around.
Pour a small amount of the flaxseed mixture into the pan.
Tilt the pan to spread the mixture evenly.
Cook for 1-2 minutes until the edges start to curl.
Flip the crepe and cook for another minute.
Serve the crepes warm with a sprinkle of sugar and a pinch of flair.
